$Comment: Authoritative DEFAULT mob-scaling settings (the SIMPLE preset), decoded via MobScalingSettingsAsset.CODEC (Pattern A, PascalCase). This is the schema-authority default, read synchronously at plugin setup() so the zero-cost registration gate can see Enabled. Owners override any key in mods/MmoMobScaling/mob-scaling.json (same PascalCase codec shape, partial allowed). Do NOT reintroduce Java-baked config defaults or loose camelCase JSON.
